title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMTelecom
description: Telecommunication infrastructure from OpenStreetMap tagged with telecom=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMTelecom

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

telecomType.description: Property. The OSM telecom tag classifying the telecommunication feature. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:telecom'

operator.description: Property. The name of the organization operating the telecommunication infrastructure.

ref.description: Property. External reference for this specific item. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:ref'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
